name: Lencseleves Fogoyhussal (Lentil Soup with Par
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the partridges in cold water for 3-4 hours.
2. Place lentils in a soup pot with chicken broth and veal bones.
3. Add carrot, parsnip, and celery to the pot.
4. Slowly bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Render bacon fat by heating it until melted.
6. Brown the partridge pieces in the bacon drippings, giving them color on all sides.
7. Remove the partridges using a slotted spoon and return them to the soup pot with lentils.
8. Make a roux by combining equal parts of the cooking fat from browned partridges and flour with chopped onion.
9. Gradually add cold water to the roux, whisking until smooth.
10. When the partridge is cooked through (approximately 2 hours), carefully add the roux.
11. Simmer for an additional 10 minutes after adding the roux.
12. Remove the cooked partridges and return the meat pieces to the soup.
3. Before serving, stir in mustard and heavy cream.
Note: Partridge can be a very tough bird; adjust cooking time as needed.
